summary: Added support for creating a profile without manually entering `Profile Name`. In `CreateProfileModal.js`, I introduced a helper that generates a random timestamp-based name with a numeric suffix, and updated the Create action so an empty name field is automatically filled and used instead of blocking creation. The generated name also respects bulk mode by switching to a `ProfileBatch` base prefix. I then ran diagnostics on the edited modal file and confirmed there are no lint issues.
current_status: Create Profile now supports auto-generated names when the name field is left blank, while the previously implemented overview sync, proxy persistence split, Start URL move, and fingerprint refresh behavior remain in place.
